headline: Retia Medical Appoints Christopher Benassi to Strategic Advisory Board
summary: Retia Medical, the developer of cardiovascular intelligence software that transforms routine physiologic monitoring data into actionable clinical insight, today announced the appointment of Christopher Benassi, former Vice President, Connected Care Group at Baxter International, to its Strategic Advisory Board.

raw.headline: Retia Medical Appoints Christopher Benassi to Strategic Advisory Board

headline: 3 Healthcare Stocks We Think Twice About
summary: Personal health and wellness is one of the many secular tailwinds for healthcare companies. Shareholders who bet on the industry have been rewarded lately as healthcare stocks have returned 10% over the past six months, topping the S&P 500 by 2.3 percentage points.
